holdings.infoBox: HERO is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are Electronic Arts stock at 7.43%, NetEase at 6.82%, Take-Two Interactive Software at 6.78%, International Games System at 5.60%, and KRAFTON at 5.38%.

overview.description: The Global X Video Games & Esports ETF (HERO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Solactive Video Games & Esports index, a modified market-cap-weighted global index of companies in video games and esports industry. HERO was launched on Oct 25, 2019 and is issued by Global X.
